things.name: Leaning Tower of Pisa
things.description: World-famous 56-metre white marble bell tower that began leaning during construction

things.name: Piazza dei Miracoli
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage square containing the cathedral, baptistery, tower and camposanto

things.name: Pisa Cathedral
things.description: Masterpiece of Romanesque architecture housing Galileo's lamp and Giovanni Pisano's pulpit

things.name: Baptistery
things.description: Largest baptistery in Italy with remarkable acoustics demonstrated by the guardian

things.name: Camposanto Monumentale
things.description: Monumental cemetery with ancient sarcophagi and rare medieval frescoes

things.name: Piazza dei Cavalieri
things.description: Second most important square with Palazzo della Carovana and the Scuola Normale Superiore

things.name: Lungarni Promenade
things.description: Elegant riverside walkway along the Arno with palaces and the iconic Luminara festival

things.name: Palazzo Blu
things.description: Blue-facade palace hosting major art exhibitions on the Lungarno

things.name: Museo Nazionale di Pisa
things.description: Major art collection in the Museo Nazionale di San Matteo with medieval Pisan sculpture

things.name: Certosa di Pisa
things.description: Stunning 14th-century Carthusian monastery with remarkable cloister and Natural History Museum
